runScenario["/anything echoes the request method correctly", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](6)
testcase.system-out:
Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String)
@api_regression Scenario Outline: /anything echoes the request method correctly # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:34 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() When I send "POST" request to "/anything" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String) When I send "PUT" request to "/anything" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String) When I send "PATCH" request to "/anything" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String) And the JSON path "method" should be "PATCH" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the JSON path "method" should be "GET" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

failure.message: class java.lang.String cannot be cast to class [C (java.lang.String and [C are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap')

testcase.failure: java.lang.ClassCastException: class java.lang.String cannot be cast to class [C (java.lang.String and [C are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap') at ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathContainsString(ApiSteps.java:251) at ✽.the JSON path "url" should contain "inspect"(file:///E:/QA_KC/KC-sdet-automation/tests/src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:95)
testcase.system-out:
@api_regression Scenario: Validate caching headers via /cache/0 (no caching) # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:108 Given I set JSON body # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setJsonBody(java.lang.String) Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient()
@api_regression Scenario: Validate ETag response # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:113 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() And the JSON path "headers.X-Test" should be "kc" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the JSON path "method" should be "GET" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the JSON path "url" should contain "inspect" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathContainsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) java.lang.ClassCastException: class java.lang.String cannot be cast to class [C (java.lang.String and [C are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap') at ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathContainsString(ApiSteps.java:251) at âœ½.the JSON path "url" should contain "inspect"(file:///E:/QA_KC/KC-sdet-automation/tests/src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:95)

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate caching headers via /cache/0 (no caching)", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](26)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario: Validate custom response headers # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:118 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() When I send "POST" request to "/anything/body" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) When I send "GET" request to "/cache/0" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response header "Cache-Control" should contain "max-age=0" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.headerContains(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Inspect JSON body via /anything", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](27)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario Outline: Different response formats should return expected content types # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:131 And the JSON path "json.id" should be 123 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsInt(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() And the JSON path "json.active" should not be null # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathNotNull(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate ETag response", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](28)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario Outline: Different response formats should return expected content types # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:132 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() When I send "GET" request to "/etag/abc123" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response header "ETag" should contain "abc123" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.headerContains(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate custom response headers", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](29)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario Outline: Different response formats should return expected content types # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:133 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() When I send "GET" request to "/response-headers?X-Env=qa&Cache-Control=no-store" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response header "X-Env" should be "qa" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.headerEquals(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the response header "Cache-Control" should contain "no-store" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.headerContains(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Different response formats should return expected content types", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](30)

testcase.name: runScenario["Different response formats should return expected content types", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](33)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario: UUID endpoint should return a UUID # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:144 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() When I send "GET" request to "/html" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "text/html" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Different response formats should return expected content types", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](34)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario: Delay endpoint should respond within a reasonable time # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:150 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() When I send "GET" request to "/encoding/utf8" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "text/html" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Gzip response should be JSON", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](35)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario: Random bytes should return binary # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:155 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I set header "Accept" to "application/octet-stream" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setHeader(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When I send "GET" request to "/uuid" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String) When I send "GET" request to "/gzip" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String) And the JSON path "gzipped" should not be null # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathNotNull(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["UUID endpoint should return a UUID", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](36)
runScenario["Random bytes should return binary", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](37)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario Outline: Image endpoints should return correct image content types # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:185 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() Given I set header "Accept" to "*/*" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setHeader(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I do not follow redirects # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.noFollowRedirects() When I send "GET" request to "/bytes/32" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer)

testcase.name: runScenario["Image endpoints should return correct image content types", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](38)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario Outline: Image endpoints should return correct image content types # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:186 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I set header "Accept" to "*/*" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setHeader(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When I send "GET" request to "/image/png" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "image" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Delay endpoint should respond within a reasonable time", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](39)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario Outline: Image endpoints should return correct image content types # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:187 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I set header "Accept" to "*/*" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setHeader(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When I send "GET" request to "/cookies/set?kc=1" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When I send "GET" request to "/delay/1" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 302 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) Given I follow redirects # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.followRedirects() And the response time should be less than 5000 ms # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.responseTimeLessThan(java.lang.Integer)

testcase.name: runScenario["Image endpoints should return correct image content types", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](40)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario Outline: Image endpoints should return correct image content types # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:188 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I set header "Accept" to "*/*" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setHeader(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When I send "GET" request to "/image/jpeg" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "image" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Image endpoints should return correct image content types", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](41)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario: Redirect endpoint should return a redirect when not following # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:191 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I do not follow redirects # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.noFollowRedirects() When I send "GET" request to "/image/svg" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "image" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Create, read and delete cookies", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](42)

failure.message: Unexpected JSONPath value for: cookies.kc expected [1] but found [null]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Unexpected JSONPath value for: cookies.kc expected [1] but found [null] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at com.algodatta.api.validators.ResponseValidator.jsonPathEquals(ResponseValidator.java:54) at ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(ApiSteps.java:245) at ✽.the JSON path "cookies.kc" should be "1"(file:///E:/QA_KC/KC-sdet-automation/tests/src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:169)
testcase.system-out:
@api_regression Scenario: /status/301 returns 301 when redirects are disabled # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:197 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I do not follow redirects # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.noFollowRedirects() When I send "GET" request to "/cookies" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the JSON path "cookies.kc" should be "1" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) java.lang.AssertionError: Unexpected JSONPath value for: cookies.kc expected [1] but found [null] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at com.algodatta.api.validators.ResponseValidator.jsonPathEquals(ResponseValidator.java:54) at ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(ApiSteps.java:245) at âœ½.the JSON path "cookies.kc" should be "1"(file:///E:/QA_KC/KC-sdet-automation/tests/src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:169)
Given I do not follow redirects # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.noFollowRedirects() When I send "GET" request to "/cookies/delete?kc" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 302 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) Given I follow redirects # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.followRedirects() When I send "GET" request to "/cookies" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer)

testcase.name: runScenario["Image endpoints should return correct image content types", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](43)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario: Redirect endpoint should reach final destination when following # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:202 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I follow redirects # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.followRedirects() When I send "GET" request to "/image/webp" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "image" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Redirect endpoint should return a redirect when not following", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](44)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario: Redirect to a custom URL # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:208 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I do not follow redirects # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.noFollowRedirects() When I send "GET" request to "/redirect/2" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 302 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer)

testcase.name: runScenario["/status/301 returns 301 when redirects are disabled", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](45)
testcase.system-out: @api_regression Scenario: /anything should echo arbitrary path, headers and payload # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_regression.feature:214 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I set header "X-Custom" to "hello" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setHeader(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And I set query param "n" to "99" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setQueryParam(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And I set JSON body # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setJsonBody(java.lang.String) When I send "GET" request to "/status/301" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 301 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer)

testcase.name: runScenario["Redirect endpoint should reach final destination when following", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](46)
testcase.system-out: @api_smoke Scenario: Basic GET should return 200 and JSON # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_smoke.feature:13 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() When I send "GET" request to "/redirect/2" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Redirect to a custom URL", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](47)
testcase.system-out: @api_smoke Scenario: GET /anything echoes the request method # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_smoke.feature:19 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() When I send "GET" request to "/redirect-to?url=https://httpbin.org/get&status_code=307" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 307 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer)

testcase.name: runScenario["/anything should echo arbitrary path, headers and payload", "httpbin Regression API suite (positive and negative coverage)"](48)
testcase.system-out: @api_smoke Scenario: Basic POST should echo JSON payload # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_smoke.feature:25 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I set header "Accept" to "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setHeader(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And I set JSON body # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setJsonBody(java.lang.String) When I send "POST" request to "/anything/alpha/beta" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String) And the JSON path "headers.X-Custom" should be "hello" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the JSON path "args.n" should be "99" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the JSON path "json.msg" should be "ping" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Basic GET should return 200 and JSON", "httpbin Smoke API suite"](49)
testcase.system-out: @api_smoke Scenario: Basic Auth positive # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_smoke.feature:37 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I use basic auth "user" and "passwd" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.basicAuth(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When I send "GET" request to "/get?hello=world" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String) And the JSON path "args.hello" should be "world" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["GET /anything echoes the request method", "httpbin Smoke API suite"](50)
testcase.system-out: @api_smoke Scenario: Basic Auth negative # src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_smoke.feature:43 Given I set API base url # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.setBaseUrl() And I reset API client # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.resetClient() Given I use basic auth "user" and "wrong" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.basicAuth(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When I send "GET" request to "/anything" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String) And the JSON path "method" should be "GET" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Basic POST should echo JSON payload", "httpbin Smoke API suite"](51)

failure.message: Unexpected status code expected [200] but found [400]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Unexpected status code expected [200] but found [400] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1419) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1383) at com.algodatta.api.validators.ResponseValidator.status(ResponseValidator.java:12) at ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(ApiSteps.java:215) at ✽.the response status should be 200(file:///E:/QA_KC/KC-sdet-automation/tests/src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_smoke.feature:32)
testcase.system-out:
@api_smoke Scenario: Get a single post # src/test/resources/features/api/jsonplaceholder_smoke.feature:10 Given I use base url "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.useBaseUrl(java.lang.String) When I send "POST" request to "/post" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.send(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) java.lang.AssertionError: Unexpected status code expected [200] but found [400] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1419) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1383) at com.algodatta.api.validators.ResponseValidator.status(ResponseValidator.java:12) at ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(ApiSteps.java:215) at âœ½.the response status should be 200(file:///E:/QA_KC/KC-sdet-automation/tests/src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_smoke.feature:32)
And the response content type should contain "application/json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.contentTypeContains(java.lang.String) And the JSON path "json.name" should be "kc" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the JSON path "json.type" should be "smoke" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathEqualsString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

failure.message: Unexpected status code expected [200] but found [400]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Unexpected status code expected [200] but found [400] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1419) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1383) at com.algodatta.api.validators.ResponseValidator.status(ResponseValidator.java:12) at ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(ApiSteps.java:215) at ✽.the response status should be 200(file:///E:/QA_KC/KC-sdet-automation/tests/src/test/resources/features/api/httpbin_smoke.feature:40)

testcase.name: runScenario["Get a single post", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](54)
testcase.system-out:
@api_smoke Scenario: Get a user # src/test/resources/features/api/jsonplaceholder_smoke.feature:25
@api_smoke Scenario: List comments for a post # src/test/resources/features/api/jsonplaceholder_smoke.feature:32 Given I use base url "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.useBaseUrl(java.lang.String) Given I use base url "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.useBaseUrl(java.lang.String) When I GET "/users/1" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.get(java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And json path "id" should be 1 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortInt(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) And json path "email" should contain "@" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortContains(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) When I GET "/comments?postId=1" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.get(java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response array at "$" size should be greater than 0 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.arraySizeGreaterThan(java.lang.String,int) And each item in response array has json path "postId" equals 1 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.eachItemJsonPathEqualsInt(java.lang.String,int) And the response should match json schema "schemas/jsonplaceholder_post_schema.json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.schema(java.lang.String) And the response should match json schema "schemas/jsonplaceholder_user_schema.json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.schema(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Get a user", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](55)
testcase.system-out: And the response should match json schema "schemas/jsonplaceholder_comments_array_schema.json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.schema(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["List comments for a post", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](56)
runScenario["List posts for a user", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](57)
testcase.system-out: And the response should match json schema "schemas/jsonplaceholder_posts_array_schema.json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.schema(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Get an album", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](58)
runScenario["Get a todo", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](59)
testcase.system-out: @api_smoke Scenario: Update a post with PUT # src/test/resources/features/api/jsonplaceholder_smoke.feature:75 Given I use base url "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.useBaseUrl(java.lang.String) When I GET "/todos/1" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.get(java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And json path "id" should be 1 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortInt(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) And json path "userId" should be 1 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortInt(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) And the response should match json schema "schemas/jsonplaceholder_todo_schema.json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.schema(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["List photos in an album", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](60)
testcase.system-out: @api_smoke Scenario: Partial update a post with PATCH # src/test/resources/features/api/jsonplaceholder_smoke.feature:90 Given I use base url "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.useBaseUrl(java.lang.String) When I GET "/photos?albumId=1" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.get(java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response array at "$" size should be greater than 0 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.arraySizeGreaterThan(java.lang.String,int) And each item in response array has json path "albumId" equals 1 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.eachItemJsonPathEqualsInt(java.lang.String,int) And the response should match json schema "schemas/jsonplaceholder_photos_array_schema.json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.schema(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Partial update a post with PATCH", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](61)
testcase.system-out: @api_smoke Scenario: Delete a post # src/test/resources/features/api/jsonplaceholder_smoke.feature:100 Given I use base url "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.useBaseUrl(java.lang.String) When I POST "/posts" with json body: # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.postWithBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 201 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) When I PATCH "/posts/1" with json body: # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.patchWithBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And json path "id" should not be null # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortNotNull(java.lang.String) And json path "title" should be "patched title" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And json path "userId" should be 1 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortInt(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer)

testcase.name: runScenario["Create a post", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](62)
runScenario["Login then fetch user details", "ReqRes API validation"](63)

failure.message: Unexpected status code expected [200] but found [403]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Unexpected status code expected [200] but found [403] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1419) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1383) at com.algodatta.api.validators.ResponseValidator.status(ResponseValidator.java:12) at ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(ApiSteps.java:215) at ✽.the response status should be 200(file:///E:/QA_KC/KC-sdet-automation/tests/src/test/resources/features/api/reqres.feature:11)
testcase.system-out:
Given I use base url "https://reqres.in" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.useBaseUrl(java.lang.String) When I PUT "/posts/1" with json body: # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.putWithBody(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And json path "id" should be 1 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortInt(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) And json path "title" should be "updated title" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortString(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the response should match json schema "schemas/jsonplaceholder_post_schema.json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.schema(java.lang.String) When I login with email "eve.holt@reqres.in" and password "cityslicka" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.loginWithEmail(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) java.lang.AssertionError: Unexpected status code expected [200] but found [403] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1419) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1383) at com.algodatta.api.validators.ResponseValidator.status(ResponseValidator.java:12) at ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(ApiSteps.java:215) at âœ½.the response status should be 200(file:///E:/QA_KC/KC-sdet-automation/tests/src/test/resources/features/api/reqres.feature:11)
And json path "token" should not be null # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.jsonPathShortNotNull(java.lang.String) When I GET "/api/users/2" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.get(java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer) And the response should match json schema "schemas/reqres_user_schema.json" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.schema(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Update a post with PUT", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](64)
runScenario["Delete a post", "JSONPlaceholder API smoke coverage"](65)
testcase.system-out: When I DELETE "/posts/1" # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.delete(java.lang.String) Then the response status should be 200 # ui.steps.api.ApiSteps.status(java.lang.Integer)
